title: Todo list display component for agent chat interface
purpose: Renders a formatted list of todos with status indicators and error handling for agent tool calls.
module_context: Defines a React functional component that displays todo items with different visual styles based on their status and handles error display.

steps.content: Extract the todos array from the tool call input.
IF no todos exist, display a 'No todos' message.
ELSE render each todo with appropriate styling based on its status.
Apply visual formatting such as bold text for in-progress items and strikethrough for completed items.
Display the todo content with proper spacing and word wrapping.
IF an error exists on the tool call, render it below the todo list.
